title: aster poliothamnus
intro: Aster poliothamnus, also known as White Pyrethrum or Mountain Aster, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aster poliothamnus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a popular natural remedy for the common cold and flu. In herbal preparations, Aster poliothamnus can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
